info.title: Baskety API
info.description: Self-hosted grocery management API. Tracks inventory, generates grocery lists, and processes receipt scans.

XHouseholdID.name: X-Household-ID
XHouseholdID.description: Optional household scope override. Falls back to caller's first household.

post.summary: Register a new user
Log in and obtain a bearer token

get.summary: List households the caller belongs to

post.summary: Create a new household
Add a member to a household

delete.summary: Remove a member from a household

post.summary: Create a share link for a household

get.summary: Access a shared inventory via share token
List inventories for the scoped household

post.summary: Create a new inventory
Add an item to an inventory

get.summary: Get the effective (non-expired) quantity on hand for an item
List active batches for an item

post.summary: Add a batch (purchase) to an inventory item
Mark a batch as emptied

get.summary: List grocery lists for an inventory

post.summary: Create a grocery list
Auto-generate a grocery list from inventory shortfalls
Mark a grocery list as completed
Archive a grocery list

get.summary: List items in a grocery list

post.summary: Add an item to a grocery list

put.summary: Update a grocery list item's status

get.summary: List receipt scans for the scoped household

post.summary: Upload a receipt image for OCR + LLM extraction

202.description: Scan accepted and queued for processing

get.summary: Get a receipt scan by ID
Get parsed line items from a receipt scan

200.description: List of scan items for user review

put.summary: Update a scan item during user review

post.summary: Commit a reviewed receipt scan to inventory
post.description: Applies the reviewed line items to the specified inventory. User confirmation is required — never auto-committed.

post.summary: Create a store

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term to filter entries by name or brand

post.summary: Create a catalog entry
Add an LLM provider configuration
Add an OCR provider configuration
